segments.text: He gets past, he goes for a read in the corner, Gluto jumps out, he's still safe, back to neutral, dash attack in the corner.
One back air is all it takes, wow!
What a catch, but he's still alive, go back, go back!
It is not over yet, Gluto has one more opportunity, one more edge guard opportunity from Gilyu as well.
Can he find the opening, can he push forward with the F tilt?
One up there away from dying, one forward tilt at the edge from dying, pretty much anything kills right now.
This is insane, if Gluto can bring this back, what are you doing?
The desperation, maybe the nerves are getting to Gluto, but they're not getting to Gilyu, the nair!
Third time is the charm, taking it, popping off, punching his ticket into top 32, winner's side!

full_text: He gets past, he goes for a read in the corner, Gluto jumps out, he's still safe, back to neutral, dash attack in the corner. One back air is all it takes, wow! What a catch, but he's still alive, go back, go back! It is not over yet, Gluto has one more opportunity, one more edge guard opportunity from Gilyu as well. Can he find the opening, can he push forward with the F tilt? And he's still alive! One up there away from dying, one forward tilt at the edge from dying, pretty much anything kills right now. This is insane, if Gluto can bring this back, what are you doing? The desperation, maybe the nerves are getting to Gluto, but they're not getting to Gilyu, the nair! Third time is the charm, taking it, popping off, punching his ticket into top 32, winner's side!
